healing-amulet.name: Healing Amulet
healing-amulet.description: Accelerates natural healing of minor wounds and bruises. The green gemstone glows softly when activated.

warding-stone.name: Warding Stone
warding-stone.description: A protective stone that wards off negative energies and malevolent spirits from your dwelling.

clairvoyant-crystal.name: Clairvoyant Crystal
clairvoyant-crystal.description: Enhances intuition and provides glimpses into possible futures when held during meditation.

enchanted-trinket.name: Enchanted Trinket
enchanted-trinket.description: A mysterious trinket imbued with general magical properties. Effects vary by individual.

mending-amulet.name: Mending Amulet
mending-amulet.description: Accelerates natural healing of minor wounds and bruises.

vitality-stone.name: Vitality Stone
vitality-stone.description: Restores energy and alleviates fatigue when held close.

fever-breaker.name: Fever Breaker
fever-breaker.description: Place under pillow to reduce fever and promote restful sleep.

phoenix-tear-vial.name: Phoenix Tear Vial
phoenix-tear-vial.description: Rare restorative elixir capable of healing grievous injuries.

bone-mender.name: Bone Mender
bone-mender.description: Speeds recovery of fractures and broken bones significantly.

heartbloom-petal.name: Heartbloom Petal
heartbloom-petal.description: Calms racing hearts and eases anxiety when worn.

purifying-salt.name: Purifying Salt
purifying-salt.description: Cleanses minor toxins from food and drink.

lifespark-gem.name: Lifespark Gem
lifespark-gem.description: Revives the unconscious and stabilizes critical wounds.
